Title: Haberler
Index_Para1: The news section is currently under construction! In the meantime, feel free to browse our archive of old news posts, videos, and changelogs.
Discord_Para1: This is a publicly-accessible archive of our Discord server's #announcements channel. It is updated manually, so it may not always be up-to-date.
Discord_Para2: Note that announcements posted prior to May 2021 survive only in screenshot form and have been transcribed by hand for your convenience,  although their original attachments and exact post dates are lost. On the other hand, announcements posted prior to December 2018 are currently missing in their entirety.
